Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 150}...It's been a long time since we've just talked like this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 150}Sorry, I don't quite remember how things went down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 150}Well, in any case, the months are going to go by quickly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 150}Make sure you enjoy your school life so you don't have any regrets.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 150}The Apathy Syndrome cases have stopped, but trouble usually stirs in the spring...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 150}You should hurry on home and study or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16405 0 0}{f 5 21 1 150}Be safe on the way home and don't get into any trouble.[n]{f 1 1}
